Thanks for contributing to the Flute SDK! Please fill the sections
below so reviewers can ship your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link any related GitHub issues or PRs. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (major version bump required)
- [ ] Internal refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation only

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public surface changes
- [ ] New exports added — listed below
- [ ] Existing exports modified / removed (breaking)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated via `npx changeset`

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests touched (sandbox)
- [ ] Manually verified the example(s) under `examples/`

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, PAN, or CVV are logged
- [ ] HTTP request paths and headers reviewed for credential leakage
- [ ] Webhook signature verification untouched OR change reviewed
